sentence: 他发声明澄清了外界的误解。
pinyin: Tā fā shēngmíng chéngqīng le wàijiè de wùjiě.
english: He issued a statement to clarify the public misunderstanding.

sentence: 全体成员举手表决通过了提案。
pinyin: Quántǐ chéngyuán jǔ shǒu biǎojué tōngguò le tí'àn.
english: All members voted by show of hands to pass the proposal.

meaning: To leave a country or region
sentence: 他在机场办理了出境手续。
pinyin: Tā zài jīchǎng bànlǐ le chūjìng shǒuxù.
english: He completed the departure procedures at the airport.

meaning: make known one's position; declare where one stands
sentence: 记者问他是否愿意表态支持。
pinyin: Jìzhě wèn tā shìfǒu yuànyì biǎotài zhīchí.
english: The reporter asked him whether he was willing to declare his support.

sentence: 请把这份合同扫描后发给我。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhè fèn hétong sǎomiáo hòu fā gěi wǒ.
english: Please scan this contract and send it to me.

sentence: 他在一家跨国公司做财务工作。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā kuà guó gōng sī zuò cái wù gōng zuò.
english: He works in finance at a multinational company.

meaning: 1. quality goods; 2. premium product; 3. fine work (of art)
sentence: 这家店只卖手工精品，价格不便宜。
pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn zhǐ mài shǒugōng jīngpǐn, jiàgé bù piányí.
english: This shop sells only handmade premium goods, and the prices aren't cheap.

meaning: 1. to be unable to say or tell; 2. to not be worth mentioning
sentence: 这道菜说不上好吃，也说不上难吃。
pinyin: Zhè dào cài shuō bù shàng hǎochī, yě shuō bù shàng nánchī.
english: This dish can't really be called tasty, nor can it be called bad.

sentence: 这个展览的门票已经卖完了。
pinyin: Zhège zhǎnlǎn de ménpiào yǐjīng mài wán le.
english: Tickets for this exhibition are already sold out.

sentence: 我每天坐公交车去上班。
pinyin: Wǒ měitiān zuò gōngjiāochē qù shàngbān.
english: I take the bus to work every day.

sentence: 这栋建筑是在世纪末建成的。
pinyin: Zhè dòng jiànzhú shì zài shìjìmò jiànchéng de.
english: This building was completed at the end of the century.

meaning: 1. to enter and garrison; 2. (fig.) to establish a presence in
sentence: 新的咖啡品牌已进驻这栋楼。
pinyin: Xīn de kāfēi pǐnpái yǐ jìnzhù zhè dòng lóu.
english: A new coffee brand has established a presence in this building.

sentence: 这家航空公司的服务非常好。
pinyin: Zhè jiā hángkōng gōngsī de fúwù fēicháng hǎo.
english: This airline's service is excellent.

meaning: 1. to include (in a collection); 2. to put together (stories, poems et
sentence: 这本词典收录了五万个词条。
pinyin: Zhè běn cídiǎn shōulùle wǔwàn gè cítiáo.
english: This dictionary includes fifty thousand entries.

sentence: 买蔬菜前要检查有没有残余农药。
pinyin: Mǎi shūcài qián yào jiǎnchá yǒu méiyǒu cányú nóngyào.
english: Before buying vegetables, check whether there are pesticide residues.

sentence: 池塘里的死水散发出一股异味。
pinyin: Chítáng lǐ de sǐshuǐ sànfā chū yī gǔ yìwèi.
english: The stagnant water in the pond gives off an unpleasant smell.

sentence: 博物馆里展出了古代战场上使用的军马装备。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnchū le gǔdài zhànchǎng shàng shǐyòng de jūn mǎ zhuāngbèi.
english: The museum displayed equipment used on warhorses in ancient battles.

sentence: 每个主日他们全家都会去教堂做礼拜。
pinyin: Měi gè zhǔ rì tāmen quánjiā dōu huì qù jiàotáng zuò lǐbài.
english: Every Sunday the whole family goes to church for worship.

sentence: 他在大学专门研究儒家经学，发表了不少论文。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué zhuānmén yánjiū rújiā jīngxué, fābiǎo le bù shǎo lùnwén.
english: He specializes in Confucian classical studies at the university and has published quite a few papers.

meaning: 1. enclosed carriage for carrying passengers; 2. motor carriage; 3. ca
sentence: 他买了一辆白色的轿车。
pinyin: Tā mǎi le yī liàng bái sè de jiào chē.
english: He bought a white sedan.

sentence: 我去邮政局寄了一个包裹。
pinyin: Wǒ qù yóu zhèng jú jì le yī ge bāo guǒ.
english: I went to the post office to send a parcel.

sentence: 医生推荐了一种新的物理疗法。
pinyin: Yīshēng tuījiàn le yī zhǒng xīn de wùlǐ liáofǎ.
english: The doctor recommended a new kind of physical therapy.

sentence: 老师让我们写一篇介绍家乡概况的文章。
pinyin: Lǎo shī ràng wǒ men xiě yī piān jiè shào jiā xiāng gài kuàng de wén zhāng.
english: The teacher asked us to write an essay introducing a general overview of our hometown.

sentence: 从不同的视角看，结果可能不同。
pinyin: Cóng bùtóng de shìjiǎo kàn, jiéguǒ kěnéng bùtóng.
english: Viewed from different perspectives, the results may differ.

sentence: 他通过炒股获利了不少。
pinyin: Tā tōngguò chǎo gǔ huòlì le bùshǎo.
english: He made quite a profit by trading stocks.

sentence: 他戒掉了烟草，身体好多了。
pinyin: Tā jièdiào le yāncǎo, shēntǐ hǎo duō le.
english: He quit tobacco and his health improved a lot.

sentence: 这种面霜有保护性的作用。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng miànchuāng yǒu bǎohùxìng de zuòyòng.
english: This face cream has a protective effect.

meaning: 1. real estate; 2. the property market (e.g. houses)
sentence: 她把所有房产都留给了孩子们。
pinyin: Tā bǎ suǒyǒu fángchǎn dōu liú gěi le háizimen.
english: She left all her real estate to her children.

sentence: 公司上半年的销售额超出了预期。
pinyin: Gōngsī shàngbànnián de xiāoshòué chāochūle yùqī.
english: The company's sales in the first half of the year exceeded expectations.

sentence: 这家餐厅的菜对我很有吸引力。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng de cài duì wǒ hěn yǒu xīyǐnlì.
english: The food at this restaurant is very appealing to me.

sentence: 厨房的龙头漏水了，要修一下。
pinyin: Chúfáng de lóngtóu lòushuǐ le, yào xiū yīxià.
english: The kitchen faucet is leaking and needs to be fixed.

meaning: 1. foot (unit of length equal to 0.3048 m)
sentence: 这块木板大概有六英尺长。
pinyin: Zhè kuài mùbǎn dàgài yǒu liù yīngchǐ cháng.
english: This plank is about six feet long.

meaning: 1. to take over; 2. to assume control
sentence: 新经理下周开始接管这个部门。
pinyin: Xīn jīnglǐ xià zhōu kāishǐ jiēguǎn zhège bùmén.
english: The new manager starts taking over this department next week.

meaning: 1. to baffle; 2. to humiliate; 3. shame; 4. dishonor; 5. humiliation
sentence: 当众羞辱别人是很不礼貌的行为。
pinyin: Dāngzhòng xiūrǔ biérén shì hěn bù lǐmào de xíngwéi.
english: Humiliating someone in public is very rude behavior.

sentence: 这款手机使用了最新的集成电路。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī shǐyòng le zuìxīn de jíchéng diànlù.
english: This phone uses the latest integrated circuits.

meaning: 1. to undergo change in weather; 2. restoration of reactionary rule or
sentence: 今天可能要变天，出门带把伞。
pinyin: Jīntiān kěnéng yào biàntiān, chūmén dài bǎ sǎn.
english: The weather might turn today; bring an umbrella when you go out.

sentence: 委员会正在讨论这项新议案。
pinyin: Wěiyuánhuì zhèngzài tǎolùn zhè xiàng xīn yì'àn.
english: The committee is discussing this new proposal.

sentence: 她在网上加入了一个摄影社群。
pinyin: Tā zài wǎngshàng jiārù le yīgè shèyǐng shèqún.
english: She joined an online photography community.

sentence: 她一直积极推动女权，主张男女同工同酬。
pinyin: Tā yīzhí jījí tuīdòng nǚ quán, zhǔzhāng nánnǚ tónggōng tóngchóu.
english: She has always actively promoted women's rights and advocates for equal pay for equal work.

meaning: name in religion (of Buddhist or Daoist within monastery); same as 法號|
sentence: 他出家后取了法名，日常都用这个名字。
pinyin: Tā chūjiā hòu qǔ le fǎ míng, rìcháng dōu yòng zhège míngzi.
english: After becoming a monk he took a religious name, which he uses in daily life.

sentence: 这片农业区土地肥沃，每年粮食产量很高。
pinyin: Zhè piàn nóng yè qū tǔdì féiwò, měi nián liángshi chǎnliàng hěn gāo.
english: This agricultural region has fertile soil and produces a high grain yield every year.

sentence: 她的经纪帮她谈好了一个大品牌的代言合同。
pinyin: Tā de jīng jì bāng tā tán hǎo le yī gè dà pǐnpái de dàiyán hétong.
english: Her manager negotiated a major brand endorsement deal for her.

sentence: 将军命令所部立即撤退到安全地带。
pinyin: Jiāngjūn mìnglìng suǒ bù lìjí chètuì dào ānquán dìdài.
english: The general ordered the troops under his command to immediately withdraw to a safe zone.

meaning: hard to endure (hot weather, itchiness etc)
sentence: 夏天工地上热得难当，工人们每小时都要补水。
pinyin: Xiàtiān gōngdì shàng rè de nán dāng, gōngrén men měi xiǎoshí dōu yào bǔ shuǐ.
english: The heat on the construction site in summer is unbearable, and workers need to hydrate every hour.

sentence: 小区的物业管理越来越好了。
pinyin: Xiǎoqū de wùyè guǎnlǐ yuè lái yuè hǎo le.
english: The property management in the residential complex has been getting better and better.

sentence: 宿舍楼里住了很多留学生。
pinyin: Sùshè lóu lǐ zhù le hěn duō liúxuéshēng.
english: The dormitory building is home to many international students.

meaning: 1. slab; 2. (geology) tectonic plate; 3. (fig.) sector (of the stock m
sentence: 科技板块今天的股价涨幅最大。
pinyin: Kē jì bǎn kuài jīn tiān de gǔ jià zhǎng fú zuì dà.
english: The technology sector had the biggest stock price gains today.

meaning: 1. to transform; 2. to convert; 3. to vary; 4. to alternate; 5. a tran
sentence: 她喜欢经常变换发型。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān jīngcháng biànhuàn fàxíng.
english: She likes to change up her hairstyle often.

sentence: 公司每个月给员工交通津贴。
pinyin: Gōngsī měi gè yuè gěi yuángōng jiāotōng jīntiē.
english: The company gives employees a monthly transportation allowance.

sentence: 那位亲王昨天访问了这座城市。
pinyin: Nà wèi qīnwáng zuótiān fǎngwèn le zhè zuò chéngshì.
english: The prince visited this city yesterday.
